vendor.name: Qualcomm
vendor.products:
<product name="OBEX" hexId="0x9008" undp=1" qdloader="2" /> <product name="Qualcomm Device" hexId="0x9009" fs="1" diag=2" />
<product name="Qualcomm Device" hexId="0x9012" diag="1" unused=" (CDC/ACM) + MODEM (CDC/ACM) (currently used for Linux builds only) /> <product name="Qualcomm Device" hexId="0x9013" diag="1" unused=" (CDC/ACM) + MODEM (CDC/ACM) + Mass Storage (currently used for Linux builds only) /> <product name="Qualcomm Device" hexId="0x9014" mass_storage="0" unused="+ Standard CDC/ECM (currently used for Linux builds only) />
<product name="Linux" hexId="0x9016" diag="1" unused="(CDC/ACM) + MODEM (CDC/ACM) + NMEA (CDC/ACM) />
<product name="Android" hexId="0x901E - Modem + ADB (Android) />
<product name="Android" hexId="0x9023 - MSC + ADB + CDC/ECM (Android) /> <product name="Android" hexId="0x9024 - RNDIS + ADB (Android) />
<product name="Android" hexId="0x9027 - BREWMP Device single FD composition. />
<product name="Android" hexId="0x9029 - ADB + DIAG + NMEA + Mass Storage (Android for Fusion - No modem on AP) /> <product name="Android" hexId="0x902A - RNDIS + Mass Storage (Android) /> <product name="Qualcomm Device" hexId="0x902B - RNDIS + ADB + Mass Storage /> <product name="Qualcomm Device" hexId="0x902C rndis="1" diag="2" /> <product name="Android" hexId="0x902D rndis="1" diag="2"+ ADB (Android) /> <product name="Android" hexId="0x902E rndis="1" diag="2"+ MODEM + NMEA + QMI_RMNET + Mass Storage (Maemo - RNDIS is used for debugging instead of ADB) /> <product name="Android" hexId="0x902F rndis="1" diag="2"+ Mass Storage (Android) /> <product name="Android" hexId="0x9030 - RNDIS + ADB + DIAG + Mass Storage (Android) /> <product name="Android" hexId="0x9031 - MSM DIAG + MDM DIAG + ADB + DUN + NMEA + RMNET + MSC (Android fusion CSFB) /> <product name="Android" hexId="0x9032 - MSM DIAG + MDM DIAG + DUN + NMEA + RMNET + MSC (Android fusion CSFB) />
